description:
You can use my code DANIEL60 and get 60 days of free Headspace here:
https://headspace-web.app.link/e/daniel

Support me on Patreon: https://patreon.com/DanielSteiner
Have a video suggestion? Let me know: https://forms.gle/BeiwQNRf8eAhQ912A

00:00 Intro
02:28 Why is Staten Island Part of New York? 
04:23 Headspace
05:47 The Dutch Impact
09:54 The English Takeover
14:06 The Revolutionary War
15:51 Why is it Part of NYC?
20:21 Why is it 'Forgotten'?
28:19 Conclusion
30:04 Fun Fact

Buy Thomas Matteo's Book: https://amzn.to/4jGTBH9
Buy Ken Gold's Book: https://amzn.to/40vQ45x
Patricia Salmon: https://patsalmonhistory.com/ 
Pocomoke Indian Nation: https://pocomokeindiannation.org/

Video about the race around Staten Island: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Ex74x_gqTU0

References: https://danielsimssteiner.notion.site/Staten-Island-References-18d5b29bde38800a8109ceaba2ca7a28?pvs=4

chapters.title: Why is Staten Island Part of New York?
Why is it Part of NYC?
